name: Slack
description: Slack — Cloud messaging platform for team communication with channels, threads, apps, and a REST bot API.

seo.title: Slack — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: Slack: Slack — Cloud messaging platform for team communication with channels, threads, apps, and a REST bot API.

when_to_use: Bot-driven developer community support routing in a server
Automated alerts from CI/CD posted to engineering channels
Customer support escalation channel with ops automation bot
Internal knowledge search via Slack AI and connected apps
PLG user community workspace with bot-based onboarding

pros: Default chat for modern knowledge work
Huge app directory and robust bot API
Channels, threads, and DMs well tuned
cons: Message retention limits on free plan sting
Search across long history still weak
review.verdict: The incumbent team chat, loved and loathed; hard to avoid even when Teams or Lark pressure it.
review.best_for: Tech-forward companies needing a best-in-class chat platform with a rich app ecosystem.
review.not_for: Microsoft-standardized orgs or teams prioritizing suite-bundled collaboration.
